title: United Kingdom - New Zealand Antarctic co-operation priorities to 2028
body: "Through their respective delegations to the Antarctic Treaty Consultative Meeting (ATCM), the Commission for the Conservation of Antarctic Marine Living Resources (CCAMLR) and their respective National Antarctic Programmes, the UK and New Zealand have identified priority areas to further underpin their historical close co-operation on Antarctic and Southern Ocean issues, up to 2028.  The document was announced as part of the first annual UK-NZ Foreign Ministers’ Dialogue in London. "
